pipeline.name: 2D Animation Pipeline
pipeline.description: From character description to animated video via ComfyUI workflows

infrastructure.env_notes: Backend does NOT read .env files. Pass COMFYUI_BASE_URL as inline shell env var. pkill unreliable — use kill -9 $(lsof -ti :4501)

wrong_models.reason: Flux 1 encoder, NOT used by Flux 2
Flux 1 encoder, NOT used by Flux 2

pulid.note: Identity preservation — keeps character face/features consistent across stages

insightface.note: Face detection/analysis for PuLID. Auto-downloads on first use.

lora_vbvr.note: Better motion dynamics than lightx2v LoRA

default.name: 2D Flat Vector
default.keywords: 2D flat vector animation, bold black outlines, simple cel-shading, vibrant solid colors, clean minimalist backgrounds, high contrast
default.negative: 3D render, realistic, blurry, distorted, morphing, low quality, jerky motion, flickering, frame skip, inconsistent style, deformed, static image

presets.name: Rick and Morty
presets.keywords: 2D flat vector animation style, Rick and Morty art style, bold black outlines, simple cel-shading, vibrant solid colors, clean minimalist backgrounds, high contrast, adult animation aesthetic
presets.negative: 3D render, realistic, blurry, distorted, deformed, low quality, sketch, pencil lines

presets.name: Studio Ghibli
presets.keywords: Studio Ghibli art style, soft watercolor textures, gentle lighting, lush detailed backgrounds, warm color palette, hand-drawn feel, expressive characters
presets.negative: 3D render, flat colors, bold outlines, low quality, blurry

presets.name: Disney 2D
presets.keywords: classic Disney 2D animation style, smooth line art, rich colors, expressive features, dynamic poses, polished cel shading
presets.negative: 3D render, realistic, flat, minimalist, low quality

presets.name: Anime
presets.keywords: anime art style, sharp clean lines, vibrant colors, dramatic lighting, detailed eyes, manga-influenced proportions
presets.negative: 3D render, western cartoon, blurry, distorted, low quality

presets.name: Minimalist
presets.keywords: minimalist vector art, flat colors, geometric shapes, limited color palette, no outlines, modern design
presets.negative: detailed, realistic, complex backgrounds, 3D render, blurry

resolution.rule: ALL stages MUST use the same resolution

video_settings.cfg_rule: NEVER increase above 1.0 — causes blur and artifacts

stages.name: Character Sketch
stages.purpose: Generate rough sketch reference of the character
stages.prompt_template: character sketch, rough line art, {character.description}, front view, 3/4 view, side view, pencil sketch style, white background

103.note: No identity ref for first stages

stages.name: Character 2D
stages.prompt_template: character sheet, {character.description}, front view, 3/4 view, side view, {style.keywords}, white background

4.note: Blank for node 4 — prevents sketch style copying

5.note: Sketch as style ref influences layout/composition without forcing sketch style. Node 5 (second ReferenceLatent) has weaker influence than node 4.

103.note: No identity ref for first stages

stages.critical_lesson: Using character_sketch as ReferenceLatent copies sketch style. Use blank.png for Stage 1B. But for Stages 2-4B, USE character_2d.png as ReferenceLatent — it provides style+identity anchoring via Flux 2 multi-reference conditioning. Combined with PuLID = double identity lock.

output_used_by_detail.2_3_4A_4B_pulid: PuLID node 103 for face identity lock

stages.name: First Frame
stages.purpose: Generate the opening scene frame with character identity locked

4.note: character_2d.png as style+identity reference via multi-ref conditioning

5.note: No additional style ref needed — character_2d provides style

stages.name: Last Frame
stages.purpose: Generate the ending scene frame — small pose change from first frame
stages.prompt_template: {character.name} {shot.last_frame_action} in {shot.location}, {shot.camera_angle}, {style.keywords}, same background composition as first frame

5.note: Ensures background continuity with first frame

stages.motion_rule: Keep small-to-medium pose change from first frame. Too much difference = broken video interpolation.

stages.name: Final First Frame
stages.purpose: Render polished styled first frame from references

stages.name: Final Last Frame
stages.purpose: Render polished styled last frame matching first frame

stages.name: Video Generation
stages.purpose: Interpolate between first and last frames to create animation

prompt_template.positive: {character.name} {shot.motion_description}, smooth motion, {style.keywords}, consistent character proportions, fluid animation

multi_shot.continuity_rule: Last frame of Shot N should roughly match first frame of Shot N+1
multi_shot.same_location_rule: Use same location_ref across all shots in same scene

comfyui_fixes.description: Required patches for RunPod ComfyUI compatibility

ImageScaleToTotalPixels.reason: Newer ComfyUI versions require this field

SaveVideo.reason: SaveVideo validation requires format and codec

LoadImage_placeholder.reason: LoadImage nodes validate file exists. Use blank for stages without reference images

CLIPLoader_not_DualCLIPLoader.reason: Flux 2 uses single Mistral encoder. DualCLIPLoader is Flux 1 only

ReferenceLatent_copies_style.problem: Using sketch as ReferenceLatent input makes output copy sketch style
ReferenceLatent_copies_style.fix: Use blank.png for reference inputs, control style via prompt only

PuLID_identity_ref.description: PuLID identity reference image — set to character_2d.png (Stage 1B output) for all stages after 1B

upload_before_send.reason: All images in LoadImage nodes must exist in ComfyUI input folder before workflow submission

error_patterns.error: mat1 and mat2 shapes cannot be multiplied
error_patterns.cause: Wrong CLIP loader or model. Usually DualCLIPLoader instead of CLIPLoader
error_patterns.fix: Use CLIPLoader with type=flux2 and mistral_fp8 only

error_patterns.cause: Newer ComfyUI requires this field in ImageScaleToTotalPixels
LoadImage references a file not in ComfyUI input folder
error_patterns.fix: Upload image via /upload/image endpoint first, or use blank.png

error_patterns.cause: Backend COMFYUI_BASE_URL wrong or ComfyUI not running
error_patterns.fix: Check pod status, verify URL, restart backend with correct env var
Add format: mp4, codec: h264 to SaveVideo inputs

error_patterns.cause: ComfyUI started before model symlinks were created
error_patterns.fix: Kill auto-started ComfyUI, recreate symlinks, restart with extra_model_paths.yaml

ops_rules: TIME IS MONEY — every second costs $0.00024 on L40S
Validate workflows LOCALLY before sending to RunPod
Check /object_info/UNETLoader — model list must NOT be empty
Batch all generations while model is loaded in VRAM
First generation is slowest (model loading) — plan accordingly
Never curl -o over a symlink — corrupts target file
Backend has no dotenv — pass env vars inline
